value.description: Value (or token to remove). Required for set/append/remove; ignored for unset.

op.description: set: assign/overwrite; append: add token (creates if absent); remove: delete token from list; unset: delete the entire variable assignment from the composed Makefile (use this to drop an upstream assignment that's wrong for our target — symmetric inverse of set).

scope.description: Target build line for this op. '@any' (default) applies universally on every build. '@current' resolves to the env's current target at apply time — use for build-line-specific fixes. Never type literal '@2026Q2'; the runner injects t.target.
